title: Izy Low-Glycemic-Friendly Argentinian Runner Bean Wrap
description: A nutritious meal-prep argentinian dish featuring runner beans, double-rise-bread, and a creamy avocado sauce for added flavor.
instructions: Slice the double-rise bread into rounds.
Toast the bread in the oven for about 2 minutes per side until lightly golden.
Gently heat the runner beans by steaming them or sautéing them briefly with a bit of oil and spices.
Prepare the creamy avocado sauce by mashing the avocado, adding soy sauce, lime juice, cumin, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
Assemble the wraps: spread a layer of the avocado sauce on each piece of toasted bread, top with roasted runner beans, and serve immediately.
Serve with a side of mixed greens for extra freshness.
